/usr/sbin/clang++ -O2 -pipe -fomit-frame-pointer -march=native -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--as-needed -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/garuda-test.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/garuda-test.dir/Domain/DomainTest.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/garuda-test.dir/Group/GroupDomainTest.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/garuda-test.dir/Update/ProgressUpdateTest.cpp.o" -o garuda-test  ../../libgaruda.a -lLLVM-22 /usr/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libgtest.so.1.17.0
